steps.title: Spot the time shift
steps.content: The passage moves from studying since the 1920s to now receiving drone assistance. The transition must signal this shift from historical to present.

steps.title: Match the temporal signal
steps.content: ”Currently” marks the present moment, showing how modern drones now enhance their long-standing research. The other choices don't capture this progression: “In comparison” and “Still” ignore the temporal dimension, while “However” wrongly suggests the drones conflict with their work. That matches choice A — A is correct.
